# hush_bitbucket_integration (Data Source)

Use this data source to read information about an existing Hush Security Bitbucket integration.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Lookup by ID
data "hush_bitbucket_integration" "by_id" {
  id = "int-abc123"
}

# Lookup by name
data "hush_bitbucket_integration" "by_name" {
  name = "my-bitbucket"
}

output "bitbucket_status" {
  value = data.hush_bitbucket_integration.by_name.status
}

output "bitbucket_workspace" {
  value = data.hush_bitbucket_integration.by_name.workspace_slug
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the Bitbucket integration
- `name` (String) The name of the Bitbucket integration

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) The description of the Bitbucket integration
- `status` (String) The current status of the integration
- `status_message` (String) The status message providing additional details about the integration status
- `workspace_slug` (String) The Bitbucket workspace slug (e.g., my-workspace)
